Plan Visit

Your Ultimate Destination for Shopping, Dining, and Fun

Experience the perfect blend of modern retail, world-class entertainment, and vibrant dining in the heart of South Bengaluru. Discover a space designed for elegance, comfort, and unforgettable memories.

Plan Your Visit Explore Brands

A World of Premium Experiences

Curated Fashion Brands

Explore a vast selection of national and international fashion houses. We bring the latest global trends directly to your doorstep in a sophisticated shopping environment.

PVR INOX Cinema

Immerse yourself in state-of-the-art cinematic technology. Our PVR INOX screens feature crystal-clear visuals and immersive sound systems for the ultimate movie experience.

Family Entertainment

From dedicated indoor amusement zones to high-tech gaming arenas, we provide safe and thrilling entertainment options for children and adults alike.

Diverse Culinary Landscape

Savor a world of flavors. Whether you are looking for a quick bite between shopping or a fine-dining experience, our restaurants cater to every palate.

Why Choose Forum?

  • ✓

    Conveniently located near the Metro for easy, stress-free accessibility from anywhere in the city.

  • ✓

    Consistently clean and safe environment, ensuring peace of mind for the whole family during your visit.

  • ✓

    A perfectly balanced mix of leisure, high-end shopping, and world-class entertainment under one roof.

What Our Guests Say

"A wonderful experience! The mall is beautifully designed, spacious, and very well maintained. Perfect for a weekend outing."

— Ananya R.

"What sets this mall apart is its indoor thrill rides and amusement park. It's a fantastic all-around destination for the kids."

— Vikram S.

"The dining options are incredible. I love the variety, and the atmosphere is always vibrant and welcoming. Highly recommended."

— Priya K.

Ready for an Unforgettable Day?

Join us this weekend for the ultimate Shopping and Entertainment experience. Plan your visit, check our store directory, and get ready to explore.
